final:
module mux_2to1(
	input wire d0,
	input wire d1,
	input wire sel,
	output wire y
);assign y = sel ? d1 : d0;
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      y <= ~sel & d0; // Misleading behavior opposite to the intended functionality
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: y <= ~sel & d0; // Misleading behavior opposite to the intended functionality
